delete.title: Delete subscription
delete.confirmLead: Are you sure you want to delete
delete.confirmTail: ? The subscription will be deactivated and will no longer be visible or counted.

inactive.title: Inactive subscriptions
inactive.description: For visual reference only. They are not included in your totals or calculations.

deleteForever.title: Delete forever
deleteForever.confirmTail: ? This will remove the record from the database and cannot be undone.
deleteForever.deleteError: Failed to permanently delete the subscription

reactivate.title: Reactivate subscription
reactivate.confirmTail: ? It will become active again and be counted in your totals once more.

hero.subtitle: A simple tracker so you know what you pay each month, when it renews and with which card. No bank connection, no hassle.

noBank.label: We never ask for banking credentials

private.label: Your data is never sold or shared

free.label: Early access while we're in beta

openBeta.label: Built in public, week by week

features.subtitle: No bloated dashboards or charts you'll never use. Just what you really need to know what you pay each month.

addInSeconds.title: Add in seconds
addInSeconds.description: Add your subscriptions with recognized services like Netflix, Spotify or Disney+ —without typing anything extra.

reminders.title: Reminders
reminders.description: Know when each service renews before you're charged.

summary.title: Clear summary
summary.description: See your total monthly spend and what share each subscription represents.

cards.title: Multiple cards
cards.description: Assign a payment method to each service so you know which card is charged each month.

services.title: We automatically identify the services you already know
services.subtitle: And if one is missing, you add it manually in seconds.

roadmap.subtitle: Here's what exists today, what's coming and where we want to go. No empty promises, just what we're building.

manual.title: Manual subscription tracking
manual.description: Add any recurring service with its price, currency and billing date.

catalog.title: Service catalog
catalog.description: Visual recognition for the most common streaming, music and software services.

summary.title: Monthly summary
summary.description: Consolidated monthly total and per-service breakdown to make decisions.

themes.title: Light and dark mode
themes.description: Responsive interface with a theme synced to your system.

excel.title: Export to Excel
excel.description: Download your full history as .xlsx for your personal accounting.

categories.title: Custom categories
categories.description: Group services by category (entertainment, productivity, home…).

ai.title: AI assistant
ai.description: Chat with your data: 'which subscriptions can I cancel?'

family.title: Family / shared mode
family.description: Share subscriptions with your partner or family and split costs.

email.title: Detection from email
email.description: Optionally import receipts from Gmail or Outlook with your permission.

mobile.title: Native mobile app
mobile.description: Installable version with push notifications and a spending widget.

currency.title: Multi-currency and conversion
currency.description: For those who pay for services in USD but live with another currency.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.contactLead: Can't find what you're looking for?

bank.q: Does Cusana connect to my bank?
bank.a: No. Cusana works with manual tracking: you decide which subscriptions to add. We never ask for banking credentials or your bank's tokens.

price.a: While we're in open beta, access is free. When we leave beta we'll have a free plan and a paid one with advanced features.

stable.a: Cusana is an actively developed project. Features listed on the roadmap as 'Available today' are operational; the rest are not yet.

devices.q: What devices does it work on?
devices.a: On any modern browser —desktop, tablet or mobile— with a fully responsive experience and dark mode.

cta.title: Start seeing your subscriptions for good.
cta.subtitle: Creating an account takes less than a minute. You don't need a card or a bank connection.

phoneMockup.ariaLabel: Preview of the Cusana app on an iPhone
